title: PGIMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Site Coordinator Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has released an official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for various Site Coordinator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Recruitment 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 202...
